title: Cmdkey.exe
html:
Cmdkey.exe

creates, lists, and deletes stored user names and passwords or credentials.

Credentials

Get credential information from host

cmdkey /list

List cached credentials — MITRE: T1078 — Privileges: User
excerpt: Cmdkey.exe creates, lists, and deletes stored user names and passwords or credentials. Credentials Get credential information from host cmdkey /list List cached credentials — MITRE: T1078 — Privileges: User
